Friends Functions

The Xbox Live friends functions include the following.

Function Description
XOnlineFriendsAnswerGameInvite

Responds to a game invitation received from another friend.
XOnlineFriendsAnswerRequest

Responds to a request from a player that that player and the current player be added to each other's friends lists.
XOnlineFriendsEnumerate

Creates an asynchronous task to enumerate the friends on the specified player's friends list.
XOnlineFriendsEnumerateFinish Caches the current friends list to the hard disk of the local Xbox console.
XOnlineFriendsGameInvite Sends a game invitation to a specified list of friends.
XOnlineFriendsGetAcceptedGameInvite The XOnlineFriendsGetAcceptedGameInvite function retrieves invitation data that was stored locally on the Xbox console when a player accepted a cross-title invitation.
XOnlineFriendsGetLatest Returns the latest friends list for the specified player.
XOnlineFriendsGetLatestByFocus Retrieves a subset of the friends list. The title describes the subset by specifying a player that should be in the middle of the list returned, and a number of entries to return prior to that player.
XOnlineFriendsGetLatestByRange Retrieves a subset of the friends list. The title describes the subset by specifying a starting offset and the number of entries to retrieve.
XOnlineFriendsGetTitleName Retrieves the name of the game title that has the specified title ID.
XOnlineFriendsJoinGame Enables a user to join an online-game session being played by a member of the player's friends list.
XOnlineFriendsRemove Removes a friend from the specified player's friends list.
XOnlineFriendsRequest Sends a request to another player asking that the two players be placed on each other's friends list.
XOnlineFriendsRequestByName Enables a player to send a request to another player asking that the two players be added to each other's friends lists.
XOnlineFriendsRequestByNameEx Enables a player to send a request to another player asking that the two players be added to each other's friends lists.
XOnlineFriendsRequestEx Sends a request to another player asking that the two players be placed on each other's friends lists. Use this function rather than the XOnlineFriendsRequest function when a voice attachment to the request is desired.
XOnlineFriendsRevokeGameInvite Revokes a pending game invitation issued to a specified list of friends.
XOnlineFriendsStartup Initializes the friends list manager and allows the use of friends lists.
